'members' => [], 'exception' => true, ], 'SourceType' => [ 'type' => 'string', 'enum' => [ 'CLUSTER', 'PARAMETER_GROUP', 'SUBNET_GROUP', ], ], 'String' => [ 'type' => 'string', ], 'Subnet' => [ 'type' => 'structure', 'members' => [ 'SubnetIdentifier' => [ 'shape' => 'String', ], 'SubnetAvailabilityZone' => [ 'shape' => 'String', ], 'SupportedNetworkTypes' => [ 'shape' => 'NetworkTypeList', ], ], ],
